basic_details.job_title: RBI Bank's Medical Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Reserve Bank of India (RBI) Bank's Medical Consultant (BMC) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website RBI Official Website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the RBI Bank's Medical Consultant (BMC) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS degree from any university recognized by the Medical Council of India in the allopathic system of medicine, Post graduate degree in General Medicine, Minimum of two (02) years' experience practicing medicine in any hospital or clinic
qualification.details: MBBS degree from any university recognized by the Medical Council of India in the allopathic system of medicine. Minimum of two (02) years' experience practicing medicine in any hospital or clinic.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for RBI Bank's Medical Consultant (BMC) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
